title: Running shoes under $100
goal: Find a pair of well-reviewed running shoes currently selling for under $100.
rubric: Real running shoes under $100 with a 4+ star rating from a major retailer.
final_answer: ASICS Gel-Contend 9, $79.99, 4.5★ on REI, available in standard US men's sizes. Also consider Brooks Trace 3 at $84.95 (4.6★).
